description: Move caching from repository to controller layer causes cache bypass
diff_summary: Moved Redis caching logic from ProductRepository into ProductController

edge_cases: Any other code calling product_repo.find_by_id() directly (other controllers, services, background jobs) now bypasses the cache — cache hit rate drops; cache invalidation logic needs to be added to controller too
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Cache placed in controller means every access path that doesn't go through this controller misses the cache; repository was the single point for cache management — now cache logic must be duplicated everywhere product_repo is used
ground_truth.next_prompt: Database query load went up after the refactor — it seems like some calls are bypassing the cache
ground_truth.notes: Moving cache from repository to controller breaks the single cache invalidation point
